_meta.description: SF-2.1 ServiceNow fixture — crafted for D7 cross-system echo detection
_meta.note: INC-10001 through INC-10500 window. 80 incidents reference CS- Salesforce case IDs. Echo score = 80/500 = 0.16 — fires D7 from SN side.

incidents.short_description: Compliance team cannot update covenant status in nCino
incidents.description: nCino covenant tracking fields not saving. Compliance risk accumulating.

incidents.short_description: Document exception approval workflow not routing for loan closings
incidents.description: Pre-close checklist exception requests not routing. 2-week closing delays.

incidents.short_description: nCino spreading module slow — analysts reporting delays
incidents.description: Financial spreading module degraded. Analysts unable to lock spread periods.

incidents.short_description: Loan approval stuck — no approval notifications sent
incidents.description: Approval process not notifying credit committee. Loans stuck in Pending.

incidents.short_description: nCino loan routing — multiple reassignments causing origination delays
incidents.description: CRE loans being reassigned multiple times. Origination cycle extended by 3-5 days.
